---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your idea in detail.

## Examples
Are there other tools or systems that do something similar?

## Trade-offs
What might we lose by adding this? (e.g., simplicity, performance, file-system purity)

## Priority
How important is this to you?
- [ ] Critical — the system doesn't work without it
- [ ] High — significantly improves the learning experience
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement
